roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/PDP/WIAPTR/3000ADV/3000ADM/3000REIN/PAJ:100 DAYS /X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR  16  DAYS,/4019HALF/X:CLIENT MAY SERVE HIS SENTENCE THROUGH A RESIDENTIAL DRUG TREATMENT PROGRAM,  CLIENT MUST COMPLETE 70 DAYS OF ACTUAL TREATMENT AT HEALTHRIGHT360,  HE WILL BE TRANSPORTED TO THE PROGRAM BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,  A BED WILL BE AVAILABLE FOR CLIENT ON FRIDAY, MAY 23,2014, THIS HAS BEEN CONFIRMEDBY MICHAEL DAVILA OF HEALTHRIGHT360,  ADULT PAROLE HAS THE DISCRETION TO MODIFY TREATMENT, CHANGE THE TREATMENT PROGRAM,SEND PAROLEE INTO A DETOX FACILITY IN THE EVENT OF A RELAPSE AND IMPLEMENTANY OTHER THERAPEUTIC MEASUREAS DEEMED APPROPRIATE DURING THE 70 DAYS OF TREATMENT,  IF CLIENT FAILS TO COMPLETE HIS 70 DAYS OF ACTUAL TREATMENT WITHOUT A LAWFUL JUSTIFICATION, HE MAY BE SUBJECT TO A NEW PETITION BASED UPONA VIOLATIONOF A COURT ORDER, PAROLE WAS SUSPENDED ON 9-20-2013,PAROLE IS REINSTATED AS OF 4-14-2014,/X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND COMPLY WITH TREATMENT PER PAROLE AGENT,/
